title: Xtra Nutty Ethiopian Radish Gored Gored
description: A nutty and tender Ethiopian dish featuring radish, perfect for midnight cravings, this Jain-friendly gored gored is a unique twist on traditional Ethiopian cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the diced radish, chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
In a small bowl, mix together the peanut butter, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the peanut butter mixture to the radish mixture and knead until well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, squeeze the lemon juice over the top of the gored gored and toss to coat.
Serve the Xtra Nutty Ethiopian Radish Gored Gored chilled, garnished with additional lemon wedges if desired.
To enhance the nutty flavor, toast some peanuts in a dry skillet over medium heat for a few minutes and chop them coarsely.
Sprinkle the toasted peanuts over the top of the gored gored before serving.
For an extra burst of flavor, add some chopped fresh cilantro to the gored gored along with the toasted peanuts.
